rules.pattern: McpConfigService read() separation: all internal callers (runner, analyzer, generators) rely on defaults being merged. Separating read into readRaw() (pure disk) vs read() (with defaults) allows manage_config:read to show what the user actually stored, without breaking 15+ callers.
rules.solution: Keep read() returning deepMerge(DEFAULT_CONFIG, raw) for all internal callers. Add readRaw() returning Partial<McpConfig>|null for diagnostic/UI callers. Add preview(projectRoot, patch) for dry-run compute. Track lastWrittenAt: Date|null on the service instance — only write() and scaffold() set it, never read paths.
